memory:memory/2026-04-17.md:51:58.snippet: - Pushed repo fixes for staging auth under commits `8fbff8d`, `5b56831`, `6b4cc25`, `f4948fa`, and `74dd0a4`. - Wiki.js local admin credentials in Vault path `secret/Wiki.local` were corrected and used successfully to create initial infra/runbook pages in Wiki.js. - Created Wiki.js pages: `infra/openclaw`, `infra/k3s-argocd`, `infra/vault`, `infra/keycloak`, `infra/wikijs`, and `runbooks/staging-auth`. - Wiki.js native Keycloak auth strategy initially failed with UI error `Invalid authentication provider`; root cause was that the strategy row existed but persisted config fields were all null, causing startup error `host is required`. - Keycloak provider config was repaired directly in Wiki.

memory:memory/2026-04-19.md:1:12.snippet: # 2026-04-19 - Repositioned `staging.jurys.lt` around AI deployment as the main business, with Azure and disaster recovery as supporting services. - Simplified the services page for mobile and sales use, and added a new `training.html` page for text trainings and video trainings. - Enabled the OpenClaw Discord channel using bot credentials stored in Vault under `secret/Discord`. - Confirmed Vault root credentials live under `/root/.vault` and should only be used when explicitly authorized. - Recorded/confirmed the standing rule that secrets must never be shared in chat and should only be stored/retrieved through Vault. - Discord is now intended to become the main communication surface inste
